title: Vežba 74

questions.text: Koja rečenica koristi reč by na način sličan by next month?

answers.answer: We need to finish the report by Friday.
He walked by the river every morning.
answers.feedback: Ova upotreba by pokazuje lokaciju, a ne krajnji datum ili vremensko ograničenje.

answers.answer: She sat by her friend at lunch.
answers.feedback: Ovde, by znači pored osobe, nije pre nekog vremena.

answers.answer: He succeeded by working very hard.
answers.feedback: Upotreba ovih by pokazuje način ili kako se nešto dogodilo.

instructions: Vežba nema zvuk. Pročitajte pitanje ispod i izaberite tačan odgovor.
explanation:
U by next month, by pokazuje poslednji datum/rok, što znači da se nešto mora uraditi pre ili najkasnije do tog vremena.

Rečenica We need to finish the report by Friday koristi by na isti način, postavljajući jasan vremenski limit.
